The BCCM in a high number of 2019 Jaguar iPace cars are going bad.  The BCCM is the main charging component of the vehicle that controls the electrical system and creates a huge hazard and series of malfunctions when it goes bad. It renders the car immobile and you can not charge

narrative.headline: What 2019 Jaguar I-Pace owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 148 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (82% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
